title: Superintendent
notes: Andreas Johansson took over as superintendent Aug 1, 2024, replacing Justin Christopher. Lori Witt is K-3 Principal / Director of Student Services / Title Coordinator (alternate ECE contact). District website domain is nfschools.org (not newton-falls.k12.oh.us, which is the older URL).

North Bass Local (Ottawa County) operates no schools and employs no instructional staff -- the few students on North Bass Island attend other districts under contract. The district is statutorily required to employ an 'on-call' superintendent but no current named incumbent identified publicly. Not a viable outreach target for ECE curriculum sales.
